case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITON $593.00 US et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $7,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY ROBERT AMPARAN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT ALFRED MILLER. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $22,091.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE AND NTC OF SEIZURE AND NTC OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFETURE PROCEEDINGS; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM MC 200, CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
